data.title: BingX, a top cryptocurrency exchange and Web3 AI firm, attains ISO 27001 certification for information security.
data.description: In Panama City on October 17, 2025, BingX, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange and Web3 AI firm, revealed that they have successfully obtained ISO/IEC 27001 certification. This certification signifies compliance with a globally acknowledged standard for information security management systems (ISMS).

data.title: RhythmX AI partners with Microsoft for personalized care through Dragon Copilot, boosting access & condition detection.
data.description: Cutting-edge precision care technology platform provides clinicians with instantaneous, clinically verified advanced intelligence in healthcare, enhancing accessibility and timely identification of potential conditions, resulting in immediate financial benefits. Located in PALO ALTO, Calif., the company RhythmX AI is at the forefront of utilizing artificial intelligence for medical purposes as of October 17, 2025.

data.title: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) released Q3 2025 results. Investors can join the earnings call today at 8 a.m. ET.
data.description: Today, in Charlotte, North Carolina, Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) released its third quarter 2025 financial results. The company is offering investors the chance to participate in the live earnings call for this quarter at 8 a.m. ET. They can do so through a webcast or by dialing in. This provides an opportunity for investors to gain insights into the financial performance of the corporation.

data.title: Weekly recap of 11 tech press releases: Solidion's new UPS battery system, S&P Global acquires With Intelligence, Twin Health partners with Peloton.
data.description: This week, PR Newswire featured several significant tech updates. Solidion Technology unveiled a cutting-edge UPS battery system, while S&P Global made headlines by acquiring With Intelligence. In addition, Twin Health and Peloton formed an exciting new partnership. The announcements, released on Oct. 17, 2025, drew attention as they unfolded in New York. Thousands of tech enthusiasts closely followed these developments.

data.title: Omio's report unveils travel trends for next 12 months, from World of Mouth to Generation Zealous. Published by leading booking platform.
data.description: Various travel trends and emerging traveler personas, such as 'World of Mouth', 'Beach Please', 'Travel Thrifties', and 'Generation Zealous', are expected to influence the upcoming year of travel. According to a report released by Omio, a prominent multi-modal booking platform based in Berlin, significant insights into travel habits and preferences for the next 12 months have been revealed. The report highlights the diversity in traveler types and trends that are projected to shape the future of travel, offering valuable insights into the evolving landscape of the travel industry.

data.title: Discover the top 5 Ethereum block explorers of 2025 with distinct features and benefits, from Etherscan to TokenView.
data.description: In 2025, Ethereum users have access to top block explorers like Etherscan and TokenView, offering distinct features and drawbacks. These platforms provide valuable tools for navigating the blockchain and analyzing transactions, with Etherscan being a popular choice. TokenView stands out with its unique offerings, catering to specific user needs. Users are encouraged to explore these platforms to make the most of their Ethereum experience.

data.title: Weekly recap features 14 health press releases from PR Newswire, covering mental health, cancer awareness, and hand hygiene. NY, Oct 17, 2025.
data.description: This week, significant healthcare updates were announced via PR Newswire, covering mental health, cancer awareness, and emphasizing the crucial practice of handwashing. The updates were released in New York on Oct. 17, 2025. Amid the extensive number of press releases released weekly, these highlights include essential information for public health.

data.title: Erayak Power Solution Group Inc. establishes U.S. subsidiary, Nexora Group Inc., in global expansion strategy.
data.description: Today, a prominent manufacturer and exporter of advanced power solution products, Erayak Power Solution Group Inc. (Nasdaq: RAYA), revealed the formation of its U.S. subsidiary, Nexora Group Inc., based in Wenzhou, China. The establishment of this subsidiary signifies a significant step in the company's expansion efforts.

data.title: RoboUP pre-launches Raccoon 2 SE on Kickstarter, a smart robot mower priced as a gas mower, debuting in November.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on October 17, 2025, RoboUP, a leading provider of smart lawn maintenance technology, will introduce its newest product, the Raccoon 2 SE, through a Kickstarter campaign starting next month. Geared towards environmentally-conscious consumers with small lawns, this advanced lawn mower will offer a budget-friendly solution for effective maintenance.

data.title: Carter’s, Inc. (NYSE: CRI) to report Q3 fiscal 2025 results on Oct 27, 2025, in a conference call at 8:30 am Eastern Time.
data.description: Carter’s, Inc., the top apparel company in North America for babies and young children, will release its third quarter fiscal 2025 results on October 27, 2025, before the market opens. The company, listed as CRI on NYSE, will conduct a conference call on the same day at 8:30 a.m. EDT to discuss the results and give a business update. For those interested, a live webcast with presentation materials will be available to view.
